name: akarelin-skills
description: Personal productivity plugins for Claude Code — file organization, search, workplace tools, and administration.

plugins.name: organize
plugins.description: File organizer with sub-skills: arxiv paper organizer and medical scan-to-Obsidian processor.

plugins.name: work
plugins.description: Workplace tools with sub-skills: M365 (Mail, Calendar, Teams, Files, Tasks), Slack (MCP), and Jira/Confluence (MCP).

plugins.name: search
plugins.description: Search with sub-skills: Everything (local file search via MCP) and M365 (cross-entity Microsoft 365 search).

plugins.name: manage
plugins.description: Admin tools with sub-skills: Claude sessions, plugin skills, and M365 tenant administration.
